# PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote)

#### [Hire Feed](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hirefeedd?trk=public_jobs_topcard-org-name) United States 12 hours ago 30 applicants [See who Hire Feed has hired for this role](https://www.linkedin.com/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fsearch%2Fresults%2Fpeople%2F%3FfacetCurrentCompany%3D110266211%26title%3DPHP%2BDeveloper&emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&trk=public_jobs_see-who-was-hired_people-search-link_face-pile-cta)

 
[Save](https://www.linkedin.com/login?emailAddress=&fromSignIn=&session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fjobs%2Fview%2Fphp-developer-backend-remote-at-hire-feed-4436954412&trk=public_jobs)

 

 

## Hire Feed provided pay range

This range is provided by Hire Feed. Your actual pay will be based on your skills and experience — talk with your recruiter to learn more.

### Base pay range

$30.00/hr - $110.00/hr

- **Role:** PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote)
- **Location:** Remote (Work from Anywhere)
- **Job Type:** Contract
- **Payout:** $30 - $110/hour

**Role Overview:**

We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a PHP Back End Developer to work on a contract basis implementing and maintaining core backend services for high-traffic web applications. The role involves developing and optimizing server-side logic to ensure scalability and performance of applications handling significant user interaction.

**Key Responsibilities:**

• Develop and maintain PHP-based backend services and APIs to support web application functionality.

• Optimize existing codebase for performance, security, and scalability.

• Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic.

• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented PHP code following industry best practices.

• Debug and troubleshoot issues across the application stack, including database queries and API endpoints.

**Required Skills & Qualifications:**

• Minimum 3 years of experience in PHP development with strong proficiency in PHP 7.x or 8.x.

• Experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel, Symfony, or CodeIgniter.

• Proficiency in MySQL or PostgreSQL database design and optimization.

• Experience with RESTful API development and integration.

• Familiarity with version control systems, preferably Git.

• Knowledge of server environments (Linux/Unix) and deployment workflows.

• Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached) and background job processing.

• Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting.

**More About the Opportunity:**

This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable backend systems powering a widely used platform. The position requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

**Apply Now!**
